input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.12.8.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:

            TITLE: the driver change area will be placed where the timing system will see the driver change as a

            rule D.12.8.3: The Driver Change Area will be placed where the timing system will see the Driver Change as a
D.12.8.3 The Driver Change Area will be placed where the timing system will see the Driver Change as a 
long lap which will be deleted from the total time.

final_answer: The Driver Change Area will be placed where the timing system will see the Driver Change as a long lap which will be deleted from the total time.
